title: Vanilla Wombat enhanced
description:
Vanilla enhanced modpack for 1.21. Not changing too much but elevate your overall play experience.
Also including builder tools like Litematica, WorldEdit and Axiom
body:
# Vanilla Wombat enhanced
![Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61351a54d1c0d6cc568db63c83e433100319fe2e.png)

**Vanilla Wombat Enhanced** is a client-side modpack designed to elevate your Minecraft gameplay experience. This modpack focuses on improving performance, aesthetics, and utility while maintaining the core vanilla feel.


## How to Report Issues
Please use the [issue tracker](https://github.com/lyssar/vanilla-wombat-enhanced/issues) on github to report bugs, crashes, and other issues. Make sure you include information about the error and attach any crash/log files you have.

## Key Features:

### Comprehensive World View
- **Xaero's Minimap** and **Xaero's World Map**: Navigate your world effortlessly and keep track of important locations.

### Enhanced Performance and Graphics
- **Sodium** and **Indium**: Optimize game performance, reducing lag and improving frame rates.
- **Iris Shaders**, **Complementary Shaders - Reimagined**, and **BSL Shaders**: Bring stunning visual enhancements to your game.
- **Distant Horizons**: Render far distances, making your world look expansive and immersive.

### Building and Creative Tools
- **WorldEdit**, **Axiom**, and **Litematica**: Provide advanced building tools to streamline your construction projects and creative builds.

### Improved GUI and Aesthetics
- **Reimagined GUI (Dark)** and **Unique Dark**: Offer a sleek and modern user interface.
- **Enchant Icons**, **Beautiful Enchanted Books**, and **Blue Netherite**: Enhance the visual appeal of items and equipment.
- **BetterF3**: Provides a more detailed and customizable debug screen.

### Ambient and Environmental Enhancements
- **AmbientSounds**, **Ambient Environment**, and **Cave Dust**: Create a more immersive atmosphere with enriched soundscapes and environmental details.
- **Falling Leaves** and **Fancy Crops**: Add charming visual effects to your world.

### Quality of Life Improvements
- **Mouse Tweaks**, **Inventory Essentials**, **Client Sort**, and **Stack to Nearby Chests**: Improve inventory management.
- **Dynamic FPS**: Reduces resource usage when the game is idle, ensuring smoother performance.
- **NoRecipeBook**, **Replanter Plus**, and **Searchables**: Streamline crafting and farming processes.

### Enhanced Interaction and Communication
- **Plasmo Voice**: Enables voice communication within the game.
- **TalkBubbles** and **Chat Heads**: Improve text chat interaction.
- **More Chat History**: Ensures you never miss important messages.

### Entity and Animation Enhancements
- **[EMF] Entity Model Features**, **[ETF] Entity Texture Features**, and **Not Enough Animations**: Bring more life and detail to mobs and player animations.
- **3D Skin Layers**: Adds depth and detail to player skins.

### Utilities and Extra Features
- **Freecam (Modrinth Edition)** and **Camera Utils**: Advanced camera controls.
- **Controlling**: Simplifies keybinding management.
- **Held Item Info** and **Status Effect Bars**: Provide useful in-game information at a glance.

**Vanilla Wombat Enhanced** is perfect for players seeking a richer, more visually appealing, and efficient Minecraft experience, without straying too far from the beloved vanilla gameplay. Download the modpack and transform your Minecraft world today!
